# API Addition Template

## Purpose

Guide additions to CLI, trace schema, profiles, or internal public APIs.

## Reference When

Use when adding commands, flags, fields, or library entry points.

## AI Agents Must Obey

APIs must be explicit, documented, and tested.

## Template

```md
# API Addition: <name>

## User Need

## Proposed Contract

CLI:
Trace/profile fields:
Python API:

## Defaults

## Error Cases

## Backward Compatibility

## Tests

## Docs
```
